data.raceName: HAPPY BIRTHDAY MISS MACKI PACE MS

runners.trainerFullName: D P BARNES, B D BARNES

data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. MY BEAUTIFUL LIFE brings good form from Tasmania where she won two of her last four starts. Has had five weeks off but was kept up to the mark with a placing at the trials. Should enjoy an economical run from the ace draw so can measure up. 3. BREATHE EASY worked from the back row so was far from disgraced when fifth at his latest appearance. Came from this barrier to place two back at Bendigo and won over this distance the last time he raced here. 8. OZZIE PEARL draws for a trail and is a chance after a string of sound recent performances including a win two back at Swan Hill. 7. NOMORELYING draws wider but must be considered after he finished runner-up when resuming at Bendigo.","runners":[1,3,8,7],"exclusive":false}
